examples: A windstorm in Washington is causing power cuts throughout the region.
The windstorm blew down their houses.
So when Bill saw the windstorm, he got an idea.
Eighteen states and the District of Columbia allow insurers to use separate windstorm deductibles.
Twelve-foot waves, whipped up by a windstorm, smacked his 24-foot craft from two directions, blowing out his windshields.
